title: No TDD enforcement
gap_description: sp-dev runs test-after not test-first; misses design-phase bug detection

title: Git-hook driven breaks flow
gap_description: Must commit/checkout to drive pipeline; superpowers runs in single session

title: No systematic debugging
gap_description: sp-dev has 3-round fix loop but no root cause investigation discipline

title: No per-task two-stage review
gap_description: QA runs batch after all dev; superpowers reviews each task (spec + quality)

title: No skill creation workflow
gap_description: stackpilot:sync inlines external skills but cannot create new ones from scratch

title: 5+ min setup vs instant
gap_description: init.sh + config + spec + commit + checkout vs /install-plugin + go

title: No IDE context
gap_description: dispatch.sh runs standalone CLI; no awareness of IDE state or open files

title: No code review protocol
gap_description: sp-qa does testing not review; no receiving-code-review equivalent

title: No per-task model routing
gap_description: Same model for all agents; superpowers uses cheap/standard/capable per task

title: Weaker verification discipline
gap_description: sp-dev verifies but coordinator/PM don't; superpowers verifies everything

title: Better parallel dispatch
gap_description: worktree_limit + background agents > superpowers single-session subagents

title: Optimize Sprint
gap_description: Goal/Scope/Metric/Verify loop with auto-revert is unique to stackpilot

title: Coarser plan granularity
gap_description: 3-5 sentence YAML desc vs full code snippets in superpowers plans

title: No actual git worktree
gap_description: Config has worktree_limit but dispatch runs in cwd, no real isolation

title: No auto skill discovery
gap_description: User must call /stackpilot manually; superpowers auto-activates on 1% match
